svg.style: background: transparent; background-color: transparent; color-scheme: light dark;
svg.content:
<mxfile host="Electron"> <diagram name="figure-3-2-data-flow" id="0"> <mxGraphModel dx="-564" dy="-193" grid="0" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="0" page="0" pageScale="1" pageWidth="827" pageHeight="1169" math="0" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <mxCell id="2" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#333333;fontColor=#000000;fontFamily=SimSun;fontSize=14;" value="外部输入
视频链接 / 图文 / 账号来源" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="70" width="180" x="60" y="80" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="3" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#333333;fontColor=#000000;fontFamily=SimSun;fontSize=14;" value="采集器与来源适配器" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="70" width="190" x="300" y="80" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="4" parent="1" style="shape=cylinder3;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#333333;fontColor=#000000;fontFamily=SimSun;fontSize=14;" value="contents
内容元数据" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="85" width="170" x="560" y="70" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="5" parent="1" style="shape=cylinder3;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#333333;fontColor=#000000;fontFamily=SimSun;fontSize=14;" value="媒体文件
videos / content" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="85" width="170" x="810" y="70" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="6" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#333333;fontColor=#000000;fontFamily=SimSun;fontSize=14;" value="人脸检测与质量过滤" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="70" width="190" x="300" y="250" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="7" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#333333;fontColor=#000000;fontFamily=SimSun;fontSize=14;" value="语义融合
视觉 / 字幕 / ASR / 正文" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="70" width="190" x="560" y="250" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="8" parent="1" style="shape=cylinder3;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#333333;fontColor=#000000;fontFamily=SimSun;fontSize=14;" value="faces
人脸记录与语义文本" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="90" width="180" x="810" y="240" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="9" parent="1" style="shape=cylinder3;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#333333;fontColor=#000000;fontFamily=SimSun;fontSize=14;" value="FAISS 向量索引" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="85" width="170" x="560" y="430" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="10" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#333333;fontColor=#000000;fontFamily=SimSun;fontSize=14;" value="文本检索 / 图片检索 / 人物聚类" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="70" width="210" x="810" y="430" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="11" edge="1" parent="1" source="2" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;endArrow=block;strokeColor=#333333;fontColor=#000000;fontFamily=SimSun;fontSize=12;" target="3" value=""> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="12" edge="1" parent="1" source="3" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;endArrow=block;strokeColor=#333333;fontColor=#000000;fontFamily=SimSun;fontSize=12;" target="4" value="元数据"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="13" edge="1" parent="1" source="3" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;endArrow=block;strokeColor=#333333;fontColor=#000000;fontFamily=SimSun;fontSize=12;" target="5" value="文件"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="14" edge="1" parent="1" source="5" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;endArrow=block;strokeColor=#333333;fontColor=#000000;fontFamily=SimSun;fontSize=12;" target="6" value="帧/图片"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="15" edge="1" parent="1" source="4" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;endArrow=block;strokeColor=#333333;fontColor=#000000;fontFamily=SimSun;fontSize=12;" target="7" value="文本上下文"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="16" edge="1" parent="1" source="6" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;endArrow=block;strokeColor=#333333;fontColor=#000000;fontFamily=SimSun;fontSize=12;" target="8" value="有效人脸"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="17" edge="1" parent="1" source="7" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;endArrow=block;strokeColor=#333333;fontColor=#000000;fontFamily=SimSun;fontSize=12;" target="8" value="semantic_text"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="18" edge="1" parent="1" source="8" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;endArrow=block;strokeColor=#333333;fontColor=#000000;fontFamily=SimSun;fontSize=12;" target="9" value="embedding"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="19" edge="1" parent="1" source="9" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;endArrow=block;strokeColor=#333333;fontColor=#000000;fontFamily=SimSun;fontSize=12;" target="10" value="查询与聚类"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> </mxfile>
